---
title: "Silver Birch (Betula pendula)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Betula*](/trees/genus/betula.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 101 — Silver birch](../101.html) |  |
| [Tree 103 — Silver birch](../103.html) |  |
| [Tree 105 — Silver birch](../105.html) |  |
| [Tree 109 — Silver birch](../109.html) |  |
| [Tree 111 — Silver birch](../111.html) |  |
| [Tree 117 — Silver birch](../117.html) |  |
| [Tree 336 — Silver birch](../336.html) |  |
